page_metadata.biotools__summary: DrugCombDB is a comprehensive database dedicated to integrating drug combinations from various data sources, include 1) high-throughput screening assays of drug combinations, 2) external databases, and 3) manual curations from PubMed literature.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DrugCombDB is a comprehensive database dedicated to integrating drug combinations from various data sources, include 1) high-throughput screening assays of drug combinations, 2) external databases, and 3) manual curations from PubMed literature.
